The '''third planet''' of the [[Calline system/Legends|Calline system]] was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. Trace amounts of industrial grade gases were in its atmosphere.
